name: REHINA - Rehabilitation of a broken machine.
description:
HELLO EVERYONE!
It has been a very VERY Long time since I've made a bot! Hopefully this can satisfy ya! She's a simple bot In my opinion, basing on MONOLITH soldiers snapping out of the C-Con's control after its destruction. Also yes, she's STALKER inspired obviously.

ART BY: @NDTWOFIVES ON TWITTER
creator: DearHayden
